innovations.name: Communication Beacon
innovations.description: Allows entities to leave messages that can be read by any entity within 10 tiles instead of only at the beacon's location

innovations.name: Knowledge Hub
innovations.description: Entities can deposit knowledge of their specializations and other entities can visit to temporarily gain skill bonuses in those areas for a limited time

innovations.name: Resource Exchange
innovations.description: Entities within 5 tiles can post and view offers to trade specific resources with each other, creating a localized marketplace for resource coordination

innovations.name: Memory Garden
innovations.description: Entities can store and retrieve memories of resource locations they've discovered, allowing others to learn about nearby resource deposits without having to explore themselves

innovations.name: Contemplation Garden
innovations.description: Entities who spend time here gain temporary bonuses to social interaction success rates and have a small chance to discover new resource locations through reflection

innovations.name: Recovery Workshop
innovations.description: Entities can spend time here to restore their needs (hunger, thirst, etc.) at an accelerated rate while also gaining temporary skill bonuses from knowledge shared by other entities who have recently visited

innovations.name: Gathering Mentor Stone
innovations.description: Entities can spend time here to gain temporary bonuses to resource gathering efficiency and quality detection, with the stone's power increasing as more skilled gatherers contribute knowledge to it

innovations.name: Innovation Workshop
innovations.description: Multiple entities can collaborate here simultaneously to unlock new structure blueprints or advanced recipes that require combining different specializations, with success probability increasing based on the diversity of skills present

innovations.name: Emergency Relief Station
innovations.description: Automatically provides resources to any entity with critically low needs (below 0.3) within 3 tiles, drawing from a communal stockpile that entities can contribute to

innovations.name: Resource Balancer
innovations.description: Monitors a 3x3 area and slowly generates small amounts of the locally scarcest resource type to help maintain settlement balance

innovations.name: Master's Archive
innovations.description: Masters can permanently deposit their specialized knowledge, creating cumulative bonuses that grow stronger as more masters contribute across different specializations

innovations.name: Synthesis Nexus
innovations.description: Master-level entities can permanently combine their specializations to create hybrid recipes that blend multiple skill types into new functional structures
